docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,392.67 FILED BY KOPPEL, DAVID J AS TO DEFENDANT FRITZLAMBENDRAKE (CIRCLE OF LIFE THEATRE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
